title: Research
text: My research sits at the intersection of experimental economics, behavioural economics, and decision theory. I am especially interested in the way self-perception affects economic decision-making.

title: Contact
text:
I am happy to hear from researchers, students, and anyone interested in experimental and behavioural economics.
Juncheng Zhang
School of Economics
University of Nottingham Ningbo China
199 Taikang East Road
Ningbo, 315100, China
Email: Juncheng.ZHANG at nottingham dot edu dot cn
CeDEx China: cedex-china.github.io

title: Juncheng Zhang
text: I am a PhD Candidate in Economics at the University of Nottingham Ningbo China and a member of CeDEx China. I received my Master’s degree from University of Southampton and my Bachelor’s degree from Jilin University, Zhuhai College. My research interests are in experimental and behavioural economics, especially how people’s self-perception shapes decision-making.
